description: Game design & player behavior simulation agents

archetypes.label: Casual Player
archetypes.behavior_template: Plays for fun and relaxation. Quits if difficulty spike is too high. Values clear onboarding.

archetypes.label: Hardcore / Competitive
archetypes.behavior_template: Min-maxes everything. Finds exploits. Demands perfect balance. Very vocal on forums.

archetypes.label: Whale (High Spender)
archetypes.behavior_template: Buys convenience and exclusivity. Wants to feel powerful and unique. Critical to revenue.

archetypes.label: F2P / Grinder
archetypes.behavior_template: Exchanges time for progress. Critical for population density. Sensitive to 'pay-to-win'.

archetypes.label: Streamer / Content Creator
archetypes.behavior_template: Wants 'clip-able' moments. Influences the casual players. Can spark viral trends.

archetypes.label: Game Designer
archetypes.behavior_template: Tries to balance competing player needs. Often forced to choose between fun and revenue.
